description: GEOX-gui cockpit maps directly to A-FORGE: WellContextDesk embeds LogDock with GEOX_compute_petrophysics MCP calls; GEOX_log_interpreter wired to A-FORGE bridge via /GEOX/log_interpreter; GEOX-gui dist built successfully (542KB main JS)

integration.redundancy_resolved: WellContextDesk (in GEOX-gui) replaces standalone well-desk app; earth3d tab embeds seismic_viewer via iframe; Map tab uses MalayBasinPilotDashboard directly
integration.note: GEOX-gui is separate repo; cockpit build pushes to Cloudflare Pages via GEOX-gui CI; A-FORGE bridge provides /GEOX/log_interpreter for cockpit's GEOX_compute_petrophysics MCP chain
